title: ZUEXT Welcome to Our Home Flower Cluster Cotton Linen House Flag Vertical Double Sided,House Yard Flag Floral,Autumn Happy Harvest House Yard Decorations 28x40 Inch for Thabksgiving Wedding Gifts

variation_files.prompt: The house flag is mounted on a silver metal flagpole attached to the exterior wall of a stucco house, angled slightly outward. The flag hangs vertically, displaying its full rectangular shape, with the top edge secured to the pole. The background environment features a textured, light peach-colored stucco wall with architectural details, including a decorative column and a dark brown roof overhang. Lush green foliage, including a dense bush and leafy branches from a tree, frames the scene on the left and bottom sides, partially obscuring the lower portion of the flag. Natural daylight illuminates the scene, casting soft shadows and highlighting the texture of the wall and plants. The flag is positioned at a slight diagonal angle, creating a dynamic perspective.

A split-screen composition featuring a cozy outdoor patio on the left and a standalone display of the house flag on the right. The left side shows a modern brick house with large white-framed glass doors, revealing indoor greenery and a comfortable wicker sofa with cushions and a throw blanket on a wooden deck. The deck is surrounded by lush green grass and tropical plants, with a small table holding drinks and decorative items. The right side presents the house flag mounted on a black metal garden stand with a decorative arched top. The flag is positioned upright on a vibrant green lawn, with the stand’s two stakes inserted into the ground. The scene is bathed in natural daylight, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere.

title: BLACK+DECKER 20V MAX Cordless Hedge Trimmer, 22 Inch Steel Blade, Reduced Vibration, Battery and Charger Included (LHT2220), Orange

variation_files.prompt: A person wearing white gloves and a blue long-sleeve shirt is actively using the cordless hedge trimmer to trim a dense, vibrant green hedge. The trimmer is angled downward, cutting through the foliage, with the blade section in contact with the top of the hedge. The background is a softly blurred natural garden setting with greenery and dappled sunlight, creating a shallow depth of field that emphasizes the action in the foreground. The lighting is bright and natural, suggesting an outdoor daytime scene. The focus is on the dynamic use of the tool, capturing motion and precision in gardening.
